languages.text: "Ущербный разум неспособен даже распознать ловушку. Ты своими руками пробудил ото сна застывших воинов, запустив примитивную силовую установку. Взываю к протоколу аннигиляции!" {n}Из окружающего мрака появляется несколько высоких искаженных фигур, в мгновение ока окружающих вас.{/n}

"A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ущербный разум неспособен даже распознать ловушку. Ты своими руками пробудил ото сна застывших воинов, запустив примитивную силовую установку. Взываю к протоколу аннигиляции!" {n}Из окружающего мрака появляется несколько высоких искаженных фигур, в мгновение ока окружающих вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

"A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

"A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

"A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

languages.text: “缺陷的心智甚至无法识别陷阱。正是你亲手激活的那粗陋的能量源，唤醒了沉睡的战士。我将启动毁灭协议！”{n}几道高瘦扭曲的身影自阴影中浮现，转瞬间便已将你团团围住。{/n}
languages.original_text: "A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “缺陷的心智甚至无法识别陷阱。正是你亲手激活的那粗陋的能量源，唤醒了沉睡的战士。我将启动毁灭协议！”{n}几道高瘦扭曲的身影自阴影中浮现，转瞬间便已将你团团围住。{/n}

languages.text: «Las mentes defectuosas son incapaces hasta de reconocer una trampa. Con tus manos, has despertado a los guerreros inmóviles al activar esta fuente de energía rudimentaria. ¡Invoco el protocolo de aniquilación!». {n}Varias figuras altas y deformes aparecen de entre la penumbra y te rodean en un abrir y cerrar de ojos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Las mentes defectuosas son incapaces hasta de reconocer una trampa. Con tus manos, has despertado a los guerreros inmóviles al activar esta fuente de energía rudimentaria. ¡Invoco el protocolo de aniquilación!». {n}Varias figuras altas y deformes aparecen de entre la penumbra y te rodean en un abrir y cerrar de ojos.{/n}

languages.text: « Un esprit déficient n'est même pas capable de reconnaître un piège. En activant votre source d'énergie primitive, vous avez ramené ces guerriers immobiles à la vie. J'invoque le protocole d'annihilation ! » {n}En une fraction de seconde, une série de silhouettes élancées et tordues fait irruption de l'obscurité et vous encercle.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Un esprit déficient n'est même pas capable de reconnaître un piège. En activant votre source d'énergie primitive, vous avez ramené ces guerriers immobiles à la vie. J'invoque le protocole d'annihilation ! » {n}En une fraction de seconde, une série de silhouettes élancées et tordues fait irruption de l'obscurité et vous encercle.{/n}

languages.text: "Kusurlu bir zihin, bir tuzağı fark etmekten bile âcizdir. Kendi ellerinle, ilkel enerji kaynağını etkinleştirerek hareketsiz savaşçıları uyandırdın. İmha protokolünü başlatıyorum!" {n}Kasvetin içinden çıkan birkaç uzun, çarpık figür; göz açıp kapayıncaya dek etrafı sarıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Kusurlu bir zihin, bir tuzağı fark etmekten bile âcizdir. Kendi ellerinle, ilkel enerji kaynağını etkinleştirerek hareketsiz savaşçıları uyandırdın. İmha protokolünü başlatıyorum!" {n}Kasvetin içinden çıkan birkaç uzun, çarpık figür; göz açıp kapayıncaya dek etrafı sarıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ein fehlerhafter Verstand kann eine Falle nicht erkennen. Ihr habt mit Euren eigenen Händen die stillen Krieger geweckt, als ihr Eure primitive Energiequelle aktiviert habt. Aktiviere das Auslöschungsprotokoll." {n}Mehrere große Gestalten lösen sich aus dem Zwielicht und umstellen euch.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}

Aktiviere das Auslöschungsprotokoll." {n}Mehrere große Gestalten lösen sich aus dem Zwielicht und umstellen euch.{/n}

languages.text: 「心は欠陥があるから、罠さえ認識できない。殲滅手順を実行する！」{n}闇の中から、数人の背の高い歪んだ姿が現れ、瞬く間にあなたを取り囲んだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "A defective mind is incapable of even recognising a trap. I invoke the annihilation protocol!" {n}Several tall, twisted figures appear out of the gloom, surrounding you in the blink of an eye.{/n}
